rationale: Section 49.004 operates on taxable property values as an input but does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount. Changing the exemption alters property values feeding the existing review framework, which already contemplates revised values (subsections a-1, a-2). No direct conflict.
quote: using the estimates of enrollment and taxable property value under Section 48.269, the commissioner shall review the local revenue level of school districts in the state
_note: The proposed homestead exemption increase would indirectly affect taxable property values used in §49.004 calculations, but the statute's framework already accommodates revised property values. No statutory conflict identified.
